question:
Look at this blood smear cell microscopy image.
Which label best describes the cell?

A. Malaria parasite is present (the cell is parasitized)

C. This is not a blood smear cell microscopy image
D. I cannot determine the infection status of the cell
choice_A: Malaria parasite is present (the cell is parasitized)
choice_B: No malaria parasite is present (the cell is uninfected)
choice_C: This is not a blood smear cell microscopy image
choice_D: I cannot determine the infection status of the cell
ground_truth: The cell is parasitized — a malaria parasite is present.
